result.stdout:
Description:
  Password command-line tool

Usage:
  password [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate  Generate a password

commands.payload:
Description:
  Password command-line tool

Usage:
  password [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate  Generate a password

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate a password

Usage:
  password generate [options]

Options:
  -l, --length <length>       Length of a password [default: 15]
  -ilc, --include-lower-case  Include lowercase letters [default: True]
  -ipc, --include-upper-case  Include Uppercase letters [default: True]
  -id, --include-digit        Include digits [default: True]
  -is, --include-symbol       Include symbols [default: True]
  -?, -h, --help              Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate a password

Usage:
  password generate [options]

Options:
  -l, --length <length>       Length of a password [default: 15]
  -ilc, --include-lower-case  Include lowercase letters [default: True]
  -ipc, --include-upper-case  Include Uppercase letters [default: True]
  -id, --include-digit        Include digits [default: True]
  -is, --include-symbol       Include symbols [default: True]
  -?, -h, --help              Show help and usage information
